title: COTTAM Heavy Duty (6 Row) Steel Wire Scratch Brush With Scraper - For Surface Preparation & Removal of Rust , Paint, Coatings, & Debris
features: Our heavy-duty (6 Row) wire scratch brush is great for tough surface preparation / cleaning. Used to remove rust, corrosion, welding swarf, paint and other general surface cleaning tasks, such as grills and BBQ’s.
The head of our brush is filled with 6 rows of heavy-duty carbon steel bristles, for serious surface cleaning and preparation.
The IWI00043 features a convenient scraper on the head of the brush to tackle stubborn debris.
The curvaceous design flows from handle to head. The curved head splays the bristle for more effective cleaning.
The elongated handle is comfortable to hold, and the soft grip offers the user more precise tool control. The hanging hole offers convenient storage in the workshop or garage.
description: Product Description CATALOGUE PRODUCTS Our catalogue is packed full of great brush tools for a wide variety of tasks, covering a multitude of trades and markets. An array of brushes, ready for dispatch...
